source:
#Imports
import json

from pyspark.sql.functions import hash
from pyspark.sql import functions as F
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp,current_timestamp,date_format
from pyspark.sql.functions import sha2, concat_ws

from pyspark.sql.types import StructType, StructField, StringType, IntegerType, BooleanType,DateType, DoubleType,TimestampType
from py4j.protocol import Py4JJavaError

from datetime import datetime
from pyspark.sql.functions import to_date

import com.microsoft.spark.sqlanalytics
from com.microsoft.spark.sqlanalytics.Constants import Constants

#Get Parameter from controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
db_notebookname= "fact_gas_consumption_composition_gold"
lake_db_name = "gold"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
#print(linkedServiceProperties)
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname)

#Destination DataLake storage details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"]
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"]
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"]

#Get Current Date
Date_Collection = spark.sql("select current_timestamp() AS Current,(current_timestamp() + interval '-1' second) AS EndDate").collect()
Gold_LoadDate = Date_Collection[0]['Current']
Gold_UpdateEndDate = Date_Collection[0]['EndDate']

#Synapse Dedicated Server detials
SynapseDedicatedServer = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['SynapseDedicatedServer'] 
TempFolder = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['TempFolder']
SynapseDedicatedDatabase = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]['SynapseDedicatedDatabase']
# Table fact_gas_consumption_composition: START

#Set table name
db_tablename="fact_gas_consumption_composition"
dedicated_db_tablename ="FactGasConsumptionComposition"

# Step 1:  Tables with current data
df_composition = spark.table("silver.gas_composition")
df_allocation = spark.table("silver.gas_allocation")
df_composition_current = df_composition.filter(F.col("CdCCurrentFlag") == True)
df_allocation_current = df_allocation.filter(F.col("CdCCurrentFlag") == True)
df_dim_site = spark.table("gold.dim_site")
df_dim_emission_scope = spark.table("gold.dim_emission_scope")
df_dim_site_current = df_dim_site.filter(F.col("CdCCurrentFlag") == True)
df_dim_emission_scope_current = df_dim_emission_scope.filter(F.col("CdCCurrentFlag") == True)


df_composition_enriched = (
    df_composition_current
    .join(df_dim_site_current.select("SiteCode", "DimSiteKey"), on="SiteCode", how="left")
    
    # Generate Month key
    .withColumn("month", F.to_date(F.date_trunc("month", F.col("Timestamp"))))
    .withColumn("DimMonthStartDateKey", date_format("month", "yyyyMMdd").cast("int"))

    # Scope
    .withColumn("EmissionScopeCode", F.lit("ES1"))  
    .join(df_dim_emission_scope_current.select("EmissionScopeCode", "DimEmissionScopeKey"), on="EmissionScopeCode", how="left")

    .drop("month")
)


df_allocation_enriched = (
    df_allocation_current
    .join(df_dim_site_current.select("SiteCode", "DimSiteKey"), on="SiteCode", how="left")
    
    # Generate Month key
    .withColumn("month", F.to_date(F.date_trunc("month", F.col("ProductionDay"))))
    .withColumn("DimMonthStartDateKey", date_format("month", "yyyyMMdd").cast("int"))

    # Scope
    .withColumn("EmissionScopeCode", F.lit("ES1"))  
    .join(df_dim_emission_scope_current.select("EmissionScopeCode", "DimEmissionScopeKey"), on="EmissionScopeCode", how="left")

    .drop("month")
)

# Step 2: Get Reference Data 

reference_df= spark.table("silver.reference_data")

def get_numeric_value(reference_df, code):
    result_df = reference_df.filter(
        (col("CDCCurrentFlag") == 1) & (col("Code") == code)
    ).select("NumericValue")

    row = result_df.first()

    if row is None or row["NumericValue"] is None:
        return None

    # Return as float (no rounding)
    return float(row["NumericValue"])

R = get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M128")
T = get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M129")
P = get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M130")
V = get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M99")
oxidation_factor = get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M118")

gcv_methane = get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M119")
gcv_ethane = get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M120")
gcv_Propane= get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M121")
gcv_i_Butane = get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M122")
gcv_n_Butane = get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M123")
gcv_i_Pentane= get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M124")
gcv_n_Pentane= get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M125")
gcv_Nitrogen = get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M126")
gcv_Carbon_dioxide = get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M127")


mw_methane = get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M90")
mw_ethane = get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M91")
mw_Propane= get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M92")
mw_i_Butane = get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M93")
mw_n_Butane = get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M94")
mw_i_Pentane= get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M95")
mw_n_Pentane= get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M96")
mw_Nitrogen = get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M97")
mw_Carbon_dioxide = get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M98")

density_methane = round(mw_methane/V,4)
density_ethane = round(mw_ethane/V,4)
density_Propane= round(mw_Propane/V,4)
density_i_Butane = round(mw_i_Butane/V,4)
density_n_Butane = round(mw_n_Butane/V,4)
density_i_Pentane= round(mw_i_Pentane/V,4)
density_n_Pentane= round(mw_n_Pentane/V,4)
density_Nitrogen = round(mw_Nitrogen/V,4)
density_Carbon_dioxide = round(mw_Carbon_dioxide/V,4)

carbon_atoms_methane = get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M100")
carbon_atoms_ethane = get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M101")
carbon_atoms_Propane= get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M102")
carbon_atoms_i_Butane = get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M103")
carbon_atoms_n_Butane = get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M104")
carbon_atoms_i_Pentane= get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M105")
carbon_atoms_n_Pentane= get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M106")
carbon_atoms_Nitrogen = get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M107")
carbon_atoms_Carbon_dioxide = get_numeric_value(reference_df, "M108")

emission_factor_co2_methane = round(((mw_Carbon_dioxide *carbon_atoms_methane*oxidation_factor)/(100*mw_methane)),5)
emission_factor_co2_ethane = round(((mw_Carbon_dioxide *carbon_atoms_ethane*oxidation_factor)/(100*mw_ethane)),5)
emission_factor_co2_Propane= round(((mw_Carbon_dioxide *carbon_atoms_Propane*oxidation_factor)/(100*mw_Propane)),5)
emission_factor_co2_i_Butane = round(((mw_Carbon_dioxide *carbon_atoms_i_Butane*oxidation_factor)/(100*mw_i_Butane)),5)
emission_factor_co2_n_Butane = round(((mw_Carbon_dioxide *carbon_atoms_n_Butane*oxidation_factor)/(100*mw_n_Butane)),5)
emission_factor_co2_i_Pentane= round(((mw_Carbon_dioxide *carbon_atoms_i_Pentane*oxidation_factor)/(100*mw_i_Pentane)),5)
emission_factor_co2_n_Pentane= round(((mw_Carbon_dioxide *carbon_atoms_n_Pentane*oxidation_factor)/(100*mw_n_Pentane)),5)
emission_factor_co2_Nitrogen = round(((mw_Carbon_dioxide *carbon_atoms_Nitrogen*oxidation_factor)/(100*mw_Nitrogen)),5)
emission_factor_co2_Carbon_dioxide = round(((mw_Carbon_dioxide *carbon_atoms_Carbon_dioxide*oxidation_factor)/(100*mw_Carbon_dioxide)),5)


# Gross Calorific Value in kJ/mol
#ref_data = [
    #("Methane", 891.51, 16.043, 0.6785, 0.02743),
    #("Ethane", 1562.14, 30.07,  1.2718, 0.02927),
    #("Propane", 2221.10, 44.097, 1.8650, 0.02994),
    #("i-Butane", 2221.10, 58.123, 2.4582, 0.03029),
    #("n-Butane", 2879.76, 58.123, 2.4582, 0.03029),
    #("i-Pentane", 2879.76, 72.15,  3.0515, 0.03050),
    #("n-Pentane", 3538.60, 72.15,  3.0515, 0.03050),
    #("Nitrogen",  0.0,  28.013, 1.1848, 0.0),
    #("Carbon dioxide", 0.0,  44.01,  1.8613, 0.01),
#]

# Gross Calorific Value in kJ/mol
ref_data = [
  ("Methane", gcv_methane, mw_methane, density_methane,emission_factor_co2_methane),
    ("Ethane", gcv_ethane, mw_ethane,  density_ethane, emission_factor_co2_ethane),
    ("Propane", gcv_Propane, mw_Propane, density_Propane, emission_factor_co2_Propane),
    ("i-Butane", gcv_i_Butane, mw_i_Butane, density_i_Butane, emission_factor_co2_i_Butane),
    ("n-Butane", gcv_n_Butane, mw_n_Butane, density_n_Butane, emission_factor_co2_n_Butane),
    ("i-Pentane", gcv_i_Pentane, mw_i_Pentane,  density_i_Pentane, emission_factor_co2_i_Pentane),
    ("n-Pentane", gcv_n_Pentane, mw_n_Pentane,  density_n_Pentane, emission_factor_co2_n_Pentane),
    ("Nitrogen",  gcv_Nitrogen,  mw_Nitrogen, density_Nitrogen, emission_factor_co2_Nitrogen),
    ("Carbon dioxide", gcv_Carbon_dioxide,  mw_Carbon_dioxide,  density_Carbon_dioxide, emission_factor_co2_Carbon_dioxide),
]


#R = 8.3144621        # J/(mol·K)
#T = 288.15           # K
#P = 101.325          # kPa
rt_over_p = R * T / P  # J/mol/kPa

df_ref = spark.createDataFrame(ref_data,["Incoming_Gas", "gcv_kj_per_mol", "molecular_weight_kg_per_kmol", "density_kg_per_m3", "emission_factor_co2"])
#display(df_ref)

# Step 3: Aggregate per gas and month
agg_gas_stats = (
    df_composition_enriched
    .withColumn("Incoming_Gas", F.regexp_replace("Descriptor", r"^Mol % ", ""))
    .groupBy("DimSiteKey", "Incoming_Gas", "DimMonthStartDateKey","DimEmissionScopeKey")
    .agg(
        F.avg("Value").alias("avg_value"),
        F.stddev("Value").alias("stddev_value"),
        F.count("*").alias("observations")
    )
    .join(df_ref, on="Incoming_Gas", how="left")
    .withColumn("t_score", t_inv_95(F.col("observations")))
    .withColumn("ci95", F.col("t_score") * (F.col("stddev_value") / F.sqrt(F.col("observations"))))
    .withColumn("avg_plus_ci", F.col("avg_value") + F.col("ci95"))
    .withColumn("avg_minus_ci", F.col("avg_value") - F.col("ci95"))
    .withColumn("weighted_gcv", (F.col("avg_value") / 100) * F.col("gcv_kj_per_mol"))
    .withColumn("weighted_gcv_plus95", (F.col("avg_plus_ci") / 100) * F.col("gcv_kj_per_mol"))
    .withColumn("weighted_gcv_minus95", (F.col("avg_minus_ci") / 100) * F.col("gcv_kj_per_mol"))
    .withColumn("weighted_mw", (F.col("avg_value") / 100) * F.col("molecular_weight_kg_per_kmol"))
    .withColumn("weighted_mw_plus95", (F.col("avg_plus_ci") / 100) * F.col("molecular_weight_kg_per_kmol"))
    .withColumn("weighted_mw_minus95", (F.col("avg_minus_ci") / 100) * F.col("molecular_weight_kg_per_kmol"))
)


# Step 4: Aggregate per site/month to get overall values including overall density
agg_monthly  = (
    agg_gas_stats
    .groupBy("DimSiteKey", "DimMonthStartDateKey","DimEmissionScopeKey")  
    .agg(
        F.sum("weighted_gcv").alias("gcv_numerator"),
        F.sum("weighted_gcv_plus95").alias("gcv_numerator_plus95"),
        F.sum("weighted_gcv_minus95").alias("gcv_numerator_minus95"),
        F.sum("weighted_mw").alias("density_numerator"),
        F.sum("weighted_mw_plus95").alias("density_numerator_plus95"),
        F.sum("weighted_mw_minus95").alias("density_numerator_minus95"),
        F.sum("observations").alias("total_observations"),
    )
    .withColumn("GrossCalorificValueMJPerM3", F.col("gcv_numerator") / rt_over_p)
    .withColumn("GrossCalorificValueUpperLimit95MJPerM3", F.col("gcv_numerator_plus95") / rt_over_p)
    .withColumn("GrossCalorificValueLowerLimit95MJPerM3", F.col("gcv_numerator_minus95") / rt_over_p)
    .withColumn("FuelDensityKgPerM3", F.col("density_numerator") / rt_over_p)
    .withColumn("FuelDensityUpperLimit95KgPerM3", F.col("density_numerator_plus95") / rt_over_p)
    .withColumn("FuelDensityLowerLimit95KgPerM3", F.col("density_numerator_minus95") / rt_over_p)
)

# Step 5: Join overall density back to gas-level and calculate emission factor 

agg_with_emission= (
    agg_gas_stats
    .join(agg_monthly.select("DimSiteKey", "DimMonthStartDateKey", "FuelDensityKgPerM3","DimEmissionScopeKey"), on=["DimSiteKey", "DimMonthStartDateKey","DimEmissionScopeKey"])
    .withColumn(
        "emission_factor_weight",
        (F.col("avg_value"))
        * F.col("density_kg_per_m3")  # per gas density from ref table
        * (1 / F.col("FuelDensityKgPerM3"))  # overall density from agg_monthly
        * F.col("emission_factor_co2")
    )
    .withColumn(
        "emission_factor_weight_plus95",
        (F.col("avg_plus_ci"))
        * F.col("density_kg_per_m3")  # per gas density from ref table
        * (1 / F.col("FuelDensityKgPerM3"))  # overall density from agg_monthly
        * F.col("emission_factor_co2")
    )
     .withColumn(
        "emission_factor_weight_minus95",
        (F.col("avg_minus_ci"))
        * F.col("density_kg_per_m3")  # per gas density from ref table
        * (1 / F.col("FuelDensityKgPerM3"))  # overall density from agg_monthly
        * F.col("emission_factor_co2")
    )
)

# Step 6: Aggregate emission factor per site/month

final_emission_factor = (
    agg_with_emission
    .groupBy("DimSiteKey", "DimMonthStartDateKey","DimEmissionScopeKey")
    .agg(
        F.sum("emission_factor_weight").alias("EmissionFactorByWeightKgCO2ePerKgFuel"),
        F.sum("emission_factor_weight_plus95").alias("EmissionFactorByWeightUpperLimit95KgCO2ePerKgFuel"),
        F.sum("emission_factor_weight_minus95").alias("EmissionFactorByWeightLowerLimit95KgCO2ePerKgFuel")
    )
)


# Step 7: Final composition combined dataframe
final_composition_df = (
    agg_monthly
    .join(final_emission_factor, on=["DimSiteKey", "DimMonthStartDateKey","DimEmissionScopeKey"],  how="left")
    .select(
        "DimSiteKey",
        "DimMonthStartDateKey",
        "DimEmissionScopeKey",
        F.col("total_observations").alias("observations"),
        "GrossCalorificValueMJPerM3",
        "GrossCalorificValueUpperLimit95MJPerM3",
        "GrossCalorificValueLowerLimit95MJPerM3",
        "FuelDensityKgPerM3",
        "FuelDensityUpperLimit95KgPerM3",
        "FuelDensityLowerLimit95KgPerM3",
        "EmissionFactorByWeightKgCO2ePerKgFuel",
        "EmissionFactorByWeightUpperLimit95KgCO2ePerKgFuel",
        "EmissionFactorByWeightLowerLimit95KgCO2ePerKgFuel"
    )
    .withColumn("EmissionFactorByEnergyContentKgCO2ePerGJFuel",F.col("EmissionFactorByWeightKgCO2ePerKgFuel") / ((F.col("GrossCalorificValueMJPerM3") / 1000) / F.col("FuelDensityKgPerM3")))
    .withColumn("EmissionFactorByEnergyContentUpperLimit95KgCO2ePerGJFuel",F.col("EmissionFactorByWeightUpperLimit95KgCO2ePerKgFuel") / ((F.col("GrossCalorificValueUpperLimit95MJPerM3") / 1000) / F.col("FuelDensityUpperLimit95KgPerM3")))
    .withColumn("EmissionFactorByEnergyContentLowerLimit95KgCO2ePerGJFuel",F.col("EmissionFactorByWeightLowerLimit95KgCO2ePerKgFuel") / ((F.col("GrossCalorificValueLowerLimit95MJPerM3") / 1000) / F.col("FuelDensityLowerLimit95KgPerM3")))
)

# Step 7: Aggregate allocation per site and month

agg_gas_allocation_stats = (
    df_allocation_enriched
    .groupBy("DimSiteKey", "DimMonthStartDateKey","DimEmissionScopeKey")
    .agg(
        F.sum("AllocatedProductionDay").alias("NaturalGasConsumptionGJ")
        )
    )


# Step 8: Pivot Gas values for final df

df_composition_renamed = df_composition_enriched.withColumn(
    "Incoming_Gas",
    F.when(F.col("Descriptor") == "Mol % Methane", "MethanePortionMolPercent")
     .when(F.col("Descriptor") == "Mol % Ethane", "EthanePortionMolPercent")
     .when(F.col("Descriptor") == "Mol % Propane", "PropanePortionMolPercent")
     .when(F.col("Descriptor") == "Mol % i-Butane", "IsoButanePortionMolPercent")
     .when(F.col("Descriptor") == "Mol % n-Butane", "NormalButanePortionMolPercent")
     .when(F.col("Descriptor") == "Mol % i-Pentane", "IsoPentanePortionMolPercent")
     .when(F.col("Descriptor") == "Mol % n-Pentane", "NormalPentanePortionMolPercent")
     .when(F.col("Descriptor") == "Mol % Nitrogen", "NitrogenPortionMolPercent")
     .when(F.col("Descriptor") == "Mol % Carbon dioxide", "CarbonDioxidePortionMolPercent")
     .otherwise(F.regexp_replace("Descriptor", r"^Mol % ", ""))
)

agg_pivoted = (
    df_composition_renamed
    .groupBy("DimSiteKey", "DimMonthStartDateKey","DimEmissionScopeKey")
    .pivot("Incoming_Gas")  # Incoming_Gas values become column names
    .agg(F.avg("Value"))  
)

# Step 8: Construct Final df  

final_df = (
    final_composition_df
    .join(agg_gas_allocation_stats.alias("agas"), on=["DimSiteKey", "DimMonthStartDateKey","DimEmissionScopeKey"], how="outer")
    .join(agg_pivoted.alias("ap"), on=["DimSiteKey", "DimMonthStartDateKey","DimEmissionScopeKey"], how="outer")
    .select(
        "DimSiteKey",
        "DimMonthStartDateKey",
        "DimEmissionScopeKey",
        "NaturalGasConsumptionGJ",
        F.col("ap.MethanePortionMolPercent"),
        F.col("ap.EthanePortionMolPercent"),
        F.col("ap.PropanePortionMolPercent"),
        F.col("ap.IsoButanePortionMolPercent"),
        F.col("ap.NormalButanePortionMolPercent"),
        F.col("ap.IsoPentanePortionMolPercent"),
        F.col("ap.NormalPentanePortionMolPercent"),
        F.col("ap.NitrogenPortionMolPercent"),
        F.col("ap.CarbonDioxidePortionMolPercent"),
        "GrossCalorificValueMJPerM3",
        "GrossCalorificValueUpperLimit95MJPerM3",
        "GrossCalorificValueLowerLimit95MJPerM3",
        "FuelDensityKgPerM3",
        "FuelDensityUpperLimit95KgPerM3",
        "FuelDensityLowerLimit95KgPerM3",
        "EmissionFactorByWeightKgCO2ePerKgFuel",
        "EmissionFactorByWeightUpperLimit95KgCO2ePerKgFuel",
        "EmissionFactorByWeightLowerLimit95KgCO2ePerKgFuel",
        "EmissionFactorByEnergyContentKgCO2ePerGJFuel",
        "EmissionFactorByEnergyContentUpperLimit95KgCO2ePerGJFuel",
        "EmissionFactorByEnergyContentLowerLimit95KgCO2ePerGJFuel"

    )
)

# Create final Gold DataFrame with CDC columns and both hashes


df_gold = (
    final_df
    .withColumns({
        "CDCLoadDate": to_timestamp(lit(Gold_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'),
        "CDCStartDate": to_timestamp(lit(Gold_LoadDate),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'),
        "CDCEndDate": to_timestamp(lit("9999-12-31 23:59:59"), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss'),
        "CDCCurrentFlag": lit(1),
        "CDCOps": lit(1),
        "FactGasConsumptionCompositionKey": sha2(
            concat_ws("||", "DimSiteKey", "DimMonthStartDateKey", "DimEmissionScopeKey"), 256
        ),
         "HashDiff": sha2(concat_ws("||",
        col("NaturalGasConsumptionGJ").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("MethanePortionMolPercent").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("EthanePortionMolPercent").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("PropanePortionMolPercent").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("IsoButanePortionMolPercent").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("NormalButanePortionMolPercent").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("IsoPentanePortionMolPercent").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("NormalPentanePortionMolPercent").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("NitrogenPortionMolPercent").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("CarbonDioxidePortionMolPercent").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("GrossCalorificValueMJPerM3").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("GrossCalorificValueUpperLimit95MJPerM3").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("GrossCalorificValueLowerLimit95MJPerM3").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("FuelDensityKgPerM3").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("FuelDensityUpperLimit95KgPerM3").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("FuelDensityLowerLimit95KgPerM3").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("EmissionFactorByWeightKgCO2ePerKgFuel").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("EmissionFactorByWeightUpperLimit95KgCO2ePerKgFuel").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("EmissionFactorByWeightLowerLimit95KgCO2ePerKgFuel").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("EmissionFactorByEnergyContentKgCO2ePerGJFuel").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("EmissionFactorByEnergyContentUpperLimit95KgCO2ePerGJFuel").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string"),
        col("EmissionFactorByEnergyContentLowerLimit95KgCO2ePerGJFuel").cast("decimal(20,6)").cast("string")
    ), 256)

        
    })
)

# Create Gold Table
spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name};""")
spark.sql(f"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}
(
    DimSiteKey STRING,
    DimMonthStartDateKey INT,
    DimEmissionScopeKey STRING,
    FactGasConsumptionCompositionKey STRING,
    NaturalGasConsumptionGJ DECIMAL(20,6),
    MethanePortionMolPercent DECIMAL(20,6),
    EthanePortionMolPercent DECIMAL(20,6),
    PropanePortionMolPercent DECIMAL(20,6),
    IsoButanePortionMolPercent DECIMAL(20,6),
    NormalButanePortionMolPercent DECIMAL(20,6),
    IsoPentanePortionMolPercent DECIMAL(20,6),
    NormalPentanePortionMolPercent DECIMAL(20,6),
    NitrogenPortionMolPercent DECIMAL(20,6),
    CarbonDioxidePortionMolPercent DECIMAL(20,6),
    GrossCalorificValueMJPerM3 DECIMAL(20,6),
    GrossCalorificValueUpperLimit95MJPerM3 DECIMAL(20,6),
    GrossCalorificValueLowerLimit95MJPerM3 DECIMAL(20,6),
    FuelDensityKgPerM3 DECIMAL(20,6),
    FuelDensityUpperLimit95KgPerM3 DECIMAL(20,6),
    FuelDensityLowerLimit95KgPerM3 DECIMAL(20,6),
    EmissionFactorByWeightKgCO2ePerKgFuel DECIMAL(20,6),
    EmissionFactorByWeightUpperLimit95KgCO2ePerKgFuel DECIMAL(20,6),
    EmissionFactorByWeightLowerLimit95KgCO2ePerKgFuel DECIMAL(20,6),
    EmissionFactorByEnergyContentKgCO2ePerGJFuel DECIMAL(20,6),
    EmissionFactorByEnergyContentUpperLimit95KgCO2ePerGJFuel DECIMAL(20,6),
    EmissionFactorByEnergyContentLowerLimit95KgCO2ePerGJFuel DECIMAL(20,6),
    CDCLoadDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDCStartDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDCEndDate TIMESTAMP,
    CDCCurrentFlag BOOLEAN,
    CDCOps INT,
    HashDiff STRING
)
USING DELTA
LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'
""")

# SCD2 logic
# Use the merge operation to update the target table
spark.sql(f"""
    MERGE INTO {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} t
    USING temp_view s
    ON t.FactGasConsumptionCompositionKey = s.FactGasConsumptionCompositionKey AND t.CDCCurrentFlag == true
    WHEN MATCHED AND t.HashDiff <> s.HashDiff THEN
      UPDATE SET t.CDCEndDate = '{Gold_UpdateEndDate}',
                 t.CDCCurrentFlag = false,
                 t.CDCOps = s.CDCOps + 1
    WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN

      VALUES (  s.DimSiteKey,

                s.FactGasConsumptionCompositionKey,
                s.NaturalGasConsumptionGJ ,
                s.MethanePortionMolPercent ,

""")

#Row count parameters
Gold_Insert_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 1 """).collect()[0][0]
Gold_Update_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 2 """).collect()[0][0]
Gold_Delete_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCOps = 0 """).collect()[0][0]
Gold_TotalRowCount_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename}""").collect()[0][0]
Gold_ActiveRecord_Post=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {lake_db_name}.{db_tablename} WHERE CDCCurrentFlag = true """).collect()[0][0]

#Row calculation
Gold_Update = Gold_Update_Post - Gold_Update_Pre
Gold_Insert = (Gold_Insert_Post - Gold_Insert_Pre) + Gold_Update
Gold_Delete = Gold_Delete_Post - Gold_Delete_Pre
Gold_ActiveRows = Gold_ActiveRecord_Post 
Gold_TotalRows = Gold_TotalRowCount_Post

log_data = [(db_notebookname,db_tablename,Gold_LoadDate,Gold_Insert,Gold_Update,Gold_Delete,Gold_ActiveRows,Gold_TotalRows)]
print(log_data)
log_columns = ['PIPELINE_NAME', 'TABLE_NAME', 'INGEST_DATETIME', 'INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE','ACTIVE_ROWS','TOTAL_ROWS']
df_log = spark.createDataFrame(log_data, log_columns)

#Write to controldb
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")

#Prepare to insert into dedicated SQL table

gold_dedicated_sql = spark.sql(f"""
SELECT 
    DimSiteKey,
    DimMonthStartDateKey ,

                NaturalGasConsumptionGJ ,

# Configure and submit the request to write to Synapse Dedicated SQL Pool

(gold_dedicated_sql.write
.option(Constants.SERVER, f"""{SynapseDedicatedServer}""")
.option(Constants.TEMP_FOLDER, (f"""abfss://temp@{TempFolder}/{dedicated_db_tablename}_staging"""))
.mode("overwrite")
.synapsesql(f"""{SynapseDedicatedDatabase}.dbo.{dedicated_db_tablename}"""))
